category_sources: Official mysqltuner.com page describes reviewing MySQL configuration and recommending performance/stability improvements.
source_facts.description says it increases performance and stability of a MySQL installation.
display_name_sources: Official mysqltuner.com page and repository README use MySQLTuner/MySQLTuner-perl.
docs_sources: Official homepage contains usage, FAQ, compatibility, and checks documentation.
source_facts.repo points to jmrenouard/MySQLTuner-perl, whose README links USAGE.md and INTERNALS.md.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/jmrenouard/MySQLTuner-perl; per instruction, not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists MySQL, MariaDB, Percona Server, Perl, and performance recommendations.
source_facts.description and executable identify a MySQL tuning CLI.
